questions.question: What Australian tourist attraction is often called the 'world's largest living creature'?
What group has more gold, platinum and multi-platinum albums than any other?
What crooner produced inauguration balls for John F. Kennedy and Ronald Reagan?
What make of plane was the first to time its machine gun to fire between the blades of its propeller?
What socially conscious media mogul helped create World Championship Wrestling?
What annually updated book has total sales of over 80 million copies, since it first hit the shelves in 1955?
questions.answer: The Guinness Book of World Records
